title: rockhausenia glaberrima
intro: Rockhausenia glaberrima is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as a wild parsley or Rock Parsley. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rockhausenia glaberrima include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. Rockhausenia glaberrima can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for medicinal use.
